headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -89.0)
key_insights: Frustrations trending up 126% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 173 quotes, including 134 at strong intensity - people are expressing very intense anger and dissatisfaction today.

• The frustration score of 85.5 sits in the middle-high range for this period, while fears hit their lowest point in 141 days.

• Frustrations ticked up slightly from yesterday while fears dropped further and optimism remains near historical lows.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
